Name: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all cases

Name: Number of times 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' occurs in the entire event log
Metric: Number of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' activities

Name: Percentage of process variants that contain 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' appearing immediately after 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' occurrences that are preceded by 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Ratio of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' to 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Number of process instances where 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' appears exactly once
Metric: the sum of the function base == 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' that occur in variants ending with 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Frequency of paths leading from 'SW-EIC Accept' to 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' activities that follow a revision cycle (i.e., occur after any 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation')
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Number of variants in which 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' is directly preceded by 'First Look-Your updates are overdue'
Metric: Frequency of activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' for cases where activity 'First Look-Your updates are overdue' occurs

Name: Percentage of total 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' occurrences that appear in the final three activities of a variant
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' occurring without a prior 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' in the same case
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all cases where 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' does not happen

Name: Ratio of variants containing 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' to those containing 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Percentage of cases where 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' marks the transition from editorial decision to production phase, as indicated by its immediate successor being 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'
Metric: Percentage of 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' out of all 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'
